children.heading: Establishment; membership; representation of interests; term of office, vacancies; reappointment
children.label: a Establishment; membership; representation of interests; term of office, vacancies; reappointment

children.text: any member appointed to fill a vacancy occurring prior to the expiration of the term for which his predecessor was appointed shall be appointed for the remainder of such term; and

the terms of the members first taking office shall expire as follows: Five shall expire three years after , five shall expire two years after such date, and five shall expire one year after such date, as designated by the Administrator at the time of appointment.December 16, 1974

children.heading: Functions
children.label: b Functions
children.text: The Council shall advise, consult with, and make recommendations to, the Administrator on matters relating to activities, functions, and policies of the Agency under this subchapter.

children.heading: Compensation and allowances; travel expenses
children.label: c Compensation and allowances; travel expenses
children.text: Members of the Council appointed under this section shall, while attending meetings or conferences of the Council or otherwise engaged in business of the Council, receive compensation and allowances at a rate to be fixed by the Administrator, but not exceeding the daily equivalent of the annual rate of basic pay in effect for grade GS–18 of the General Schedule for each day (including traveltime) during which they are engaged in the actual performance of duties vested in the Council. While away from their homes or regular places of business in the performance of services for the Council, members of the Council shall be allowed travel expenses, including per diem in lieu of subsistence, in the same manner as persons employed intermittently in the Government service are allowed expenses under section 5703(b) of title 5.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Advisory committee termination provision inapplicable
children.label: d Advisory committee termination provision inapplicable
children.text: (relating to termination), shall not apply to the Council.Section 1013(a) of title 52So in original. The comma probably should not appear.2
